zh.lifeSummary: Mrs. Randal Maynwarynge於大約1368年出生在英國英格蘭爾奧福 素培利奧。她於大約1388年與Sir Ranulph Mainwaring在英國英格蘭爾洛維爾 奧福結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Randal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly U.S.: medieval vernacular form of   Randolf .  This was in common use as a given name into the 17th century and gave rise to a surname. In modern use the given name is often a transferred use of this surname.

variants.name: Randell
meanings: Mainly U.S.: medieval vernacular form of   Randolf .  This was in common use as a given name into the 17th century and gave rise to a surname. In modern use the given name is often a transferred use of this surname.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Randal Maynwarynge was born about 1368, in Peover Superior, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Sir Ranulph Mainwaring about 1388, in Lower Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Randal Maynwarynge(은)는 대략 1368년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 p오버 수페리어에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1388년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 로어 p오버에서 Sir Ranulph Mainwaring(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. Randal Maynwarynge родилась около 1368 г. в местности пеовир супириор, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Ranulph Mainwaring около 1388 г. в местности лоуир пеовир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.
